title: 60-Second Lead Response for Marketing Agencies
metaDescription: Every new lead replied to in under 60 seconds, in your agency's voice, with your booking link. We build the first one free on your real leads.
excerpt: Most marketing agencies lose deals not on price but on speed. The fix is mechanical: answer every new lead in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link.

sections.intro:
Most marketing agencies lose deals not on price but on speed. A prospect fills out the contact form, and by the time someone replies a few hours later they have already booked with whoever answered first. Speed of reply is the strongest predictor of whether a lead becomes a call. It beats positioning, it beats portfolio, it beats price.

The fix is mechanical, not strategic. Every new lead gets a personalized reply in under 60 seconds, in your agency's voice, with your booking link. The team is pinged at the same time so the right person can follow up by name. The lead never goes cold.

This is the Capabilities layer of an AI Operating System. We build it for you free, on your real leads, before you commit to anything else.
sections.fourCFit:
The 60-Second Lead Engine is the highest-leverage Capability we install, and it leans on the other three Cs to work:

  • Context: it writes in your voice. We capture how you talk to prospects so the reply does not sound like a chatbot.
  • Connections: it lives on your inbox, your form, and your calendar. New submissions trigger the reply and push the lead into your CRM as the same record, not a duplicate.
  • Capabilities: the reply itself, plus routing to the right account lead, plus a booking link tuned to availability.
  • Cadence: a no-show or no-reply triggers a follow-up sequence on day 1, day 3, and day 6.

It is the wedge into the larger system. Most agencies start here. See the full installable system at AI Operating System for Marketing Agencies.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
The SLA is concrete:

  • Reply lands in the prospect's inbox in under 60 seconds, every time, around the clock.
  • Reply is personalized to the lead (their name, their company, any field they filled), in your agency's voice, no boilerplate.
  • Reply contains your booking link. The link respects your calendar so they can only pick a slot you would actually take.
  • You and the right account lead get pinged instantly with the lead, the source, and the reply that went out.
  • The lead is in your CRM as the same record (HubSpot, Pipedrive, your sheet), not duplicated, not lost.

If they do not book, a follow-up sequence runs on day 1, day 3, and day 6 in the same voice. If they reply mid-sequence, the sequence stops.
sections.howWeInstall:
Three phases, but this Capability is the one we always offer to build free first so you can see it work on your real leads:

  1. Audit, free, about 10 minutes. We score your AI readiness across the Four Cs and confirm Lead Engine fit. Run the audit.
  2. Install the Lead Engine, free. We connect your form, your inbox, your calendar, and your CRM. We capture your voice from real past replies. The first live reply usually goes out within a week.
  3. Operate, ongoing if you want us to. If the Lead Engine books calls you would have missed, we operate the rest of your AIOS on a monthly plan. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
Lead response time has decades of data behind it. Studies repeatedly find that responding within the first minute or two increases qualification and close rate by several multiples versus responding within the first hour. The exact numbers vary by source and industry, but the direction is consistent and large.

For a typical marketing agency, here is what we plan against:

  • Median lead reply time: from hours (often the next business day) to under 60 seconds.
  • Lead-to-booked-call rate: a meaningful lift on the leads you were already getting, with no extra ad spend.
  • Calendar coverage: leads that fill out the form on a Saturday morning get the same SLA as Tuesday at 10am.

The standing guarantee on the wider AIOS engagement applies once you go past the free build: recover 40 or more hours a month, or we keep working free until you do.
sections.faq:
What does the free build actually include?

The full 60-Second Lead Engine wired into your form, inbox, calendar, and CRM, with your voice captured from past replies. No credit card, no time commitment beyond letting us see it work on your real leads.

What happens after the free build?

If it books calls you would have missed, we run the rest of your operations on a monthly plan. If it does not, we walk away and you keep what we built.

Who owns the system?

You do. Every prompt, connection, and automation lives in your accounts. If you ever stop working with us, you keep all of it.
